# Supporting References (Non-Binding)

## Primary Project Documents (Version 1.0)
- Bitcoin Sovereign Open License (BSOL) v1.0 – https://github.com/MoloBTC-Org/bsol/blob/main/LICENSE.md
- Sovereign Bitcoin Knowledge Declaration Version 1.0 – https://github.com/MoloBTC-Org/bsol/blob/main/SOVEREIGN-KNOWLEDGE-DECLARATION.md

## Foundational Sources (Full Links)
- Satoshi Nakamoto. (2008). *Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System*. https://bitcoin.org/bitcoin.pdf
- Eric Hughes. (1993). *A Cypherpunk’s Manifesto*. https://www.activism.net/cypherpunk/manifesto.html
- Apache Software Foundation. (2004). *Apache License, Version 2.0*. https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

## Funding & Ecosystem Models
- Direct BTC donations and value-exchange (see DONATIONS.md)
- GitHub Sponsors – https://github.com/sponsors
- OpenSats – https://opensats.org
- HRF Bitcoin Development Fund – https://hrf.org/program/financial-freedom/bitcoin-development-fund/
